market_overview.headline: Broad market weakness with SPY and QQQ both in bearish unstacked formations, while 31% of stocks remain in full bear mode.
market_overview.detail: Only 25% of stocks show full bull signals vs 31% in full bear, with major indices below all EMAs on low volume. BTC's full bear structure at -44% from fair value adds to risk-off sentiment.

reversal_candidates.headline: Bear Rally Reversal Watch — Bullish Crossover Alerts

momentum_themes.headline: Storage & Memory Leading Momentum
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum with storage stocks leading - SNDK up 51% vs 21W, WDC +26%, MU +28%. Memory/storage cycle turning while AI infrastructure demand sustains.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Leading, Tech Services Lagging

strongest.note: Perfect bullish setup with all 11 names in full bull mode
Chemical and materials companies showing broad strength
Mining and metals in pullback mode but maintaining bullish structure

weakest.note: Software and cloud names under severe pressure with 90% bearish
Banking sector struggling with 61% bearish amid rate concerns

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth tech into value sectors - energy, materials, and industrials leading while software and financial services lag significantly.

items.text: Both SPY and QQQ in bearish unstacked formation with potential 13W breakdown risk
BTC full bear structure at -44% fair value suggests continued risk-off environment
Technology services sector in complete breakdown with 90% bearish readings
High volume on ADTTF pullback (5.71x avg) suggests institutional selling pressure
